cast.name: 帕斯卡尔·德雷维隆 Pascale Drevillon

writer.name: 让-弗朗索瓦·阿瑟兰 Jean-François Asselin
加布里埃尔·伯利安妮-特兰姆雷 Gabrielle Boulianne-Tremblay

director.name: 让-弗朗索瓦·阿瑟兰 Jean-François Asselin

introduction: François, a 50-year-old screenwriter whose career is on the decline, cynically ticks the "transgender" box to secure funding for his latest TV series project. When, against all odds, his plan works and his project is accepted, he finds himself having to portray... Françoise, an author beginning her transition. Unable to fulfill the required role, he must team up with Sarah, a real trans writer. As Françoise, François finally achieves success. He fills his bank account and reconnects with his teenage daughter... but as his deception continues, the price to pay proves higher than expected: his truest bonds are forged around his new identity. Françoise liberates him as much as she imprisons him.
